profile.name: Ndanga Heritier Umuragwa
profile.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
profile.tagline: Full-stack developer and technical support professional building practical web platforms, API-driven dashboards, and customer-focused digital solutions.
profile.summary: I build responsive web applications and operational platforms with React.js, Firebase, Pocketbase, Supabase, MongoDB, NextJs, TypeScript, Laravel, PHP, MySQL, and REST APIs. My experience combines software delivery, API integration, technical support, documentation, customer service, and quality assurance, giving me a practical view of how technology supports real users and business operations.

paragraphs: I am a full-stack web developer focused on building useful, reliable systems for teams and customers. My work spans developer-first platforms, dashboards, booking systems, telemedicine workflows, ride-sharing tools, and multi-sided commerce platforms.

Beyond development, I bring hands-on experience in technical support, after-sales service, warranty coordination, vehicle inspection, quality assurance, reporting, and client relationship management. That mix helps me design software with a strong understanding of user needs, operational processes, and delivery standards.
I enjoy turning requirements into clean interfaces, connecting frontend experiences to APIs, and collaborating with teams through reviews, documentation, troubleshooting, and steady execution.

highlights.label: Integrations
highlights.value: Paystack, Agora APIs, Pickup Mtaani, dashboards

experience.summary: Support customers after vehicle delivery by coordinating service requests, warranty processes, documentation, reporting, and technical follow-up.
responsibilities: Provide customer support and maintain professional client relationships.
Coordinate warranty cases, service activities, documentation, and reporting.
Assist with technical troubleshooting and follow-up on customer issues.

experience.summary: Delivered technical support across hardware, software, network troubleshooting, diagnostics, end-user assistance, and technical documentation.
responsibilities: Resolved hardware, software, and network issues for end users.
Performed system diagnostics and documented technical support activities.
Assisted customers with troubleshooting, guidance, and follow-up.
